blurb: EnergyKit provides APIs for home energy management devices – including EV chargers, solar panels, and battery storage systems – with a privacy model restricting app access to energy usage data through user-granted permissions. Energy usage data, which can reveal behavioral patterns about occupancy and daily routines, is protected under TCC-style authorization requiring explicit user consent before any app can read home energy measurements. Data from EnergyKit-connected devices flows through HomeKit infrastructure, inheriting its end-to-end encrypted CloudKit storage model, ensuring energy data never transits Apple servers in plaintext.
